title: Getting Triggered By User from Forum
excerpt:
Hello, 
I created a forum that only users who are logged into monday.com are able to use.    I want to populate a people column with the user who submitted the form. Is this possible? I don’t seem to be able to get it to…

posts.author: brateris (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I created a forum that only users who are logged into monday.com are able to use. I want to populate a people column with the user who submitted the form. Is this possible? I don’t seem to be able to get it to work. Because of what the form does and how many times a user will submit the form, I do not want users to have to select their name from a drop down.

Thanks,
Dan

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yea, you’ll just need to add an automation.

image586×328 10.4 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: brateris (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! That worked! I wonder why I could not get the same functionality to work in an a workflow? I think it’s ok to use both automations and workflows, but it’s frustrating to have to separate functionality…

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can do it with workflow center as well…

image1532×665 38.5 KB

posts.author: brateris (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. Do you know if “Assign Item Creator” works differently than using “Change column value” and setting value to the “Triggered By User”? This is how I was approaching it and it was not working.
